title: APIMachine
description: Create RESTful API for your Minecraft server with PlaceholderAPI values.
body:
# APIMachine

Create a RESTful API for your Minecraft server, with custom values, such as a PlaceholderAPI placeholder value.
## Requirements

- A [Paper](https://papermc.org) server
- [PlaceholderAPI](https://placeholderapi.com) Plugin

## Wiki

You can view the wiki [here](https://mallusrgreat.gitbook.io/mallusrgreats-plugins/). This page is a go-to if you want to learn about all the features this plugin offers. This modrinth page only covers the basics.


## Installation

Installation is very typical.

- Download the plugin
- Put it in (server folder)/plugins
- (Re)start your server.

## Usage

If you haven't touched the config.yml file, then you should be able to see the default page at `(machine ip):4567/api/global`
Right now, it simply shows your Minecraft server's name with the `%server_name%` placeholder from the PlaceholderAPI expansion named Server.
If you don't want an advanced use of it, changing the default values will do just fine.
